content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty opened weak (-0.46%) with IT leading declines (-1.91%) post weak Infy guidance. VIX at 18.89 and rising suggests elevated uncertainty. Book is 79% deployed already — priority is position management, not new entries. Multiple holdings have earnings events in next 3-7 days which warrant SL discipline.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24250
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.50,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position down -5.9% but thesis (strong Q4, 35% PAT growth, sector leadership) remains intact. Current SL at 73 is too wide for position size. Tightening SL to 74.50 (just below recent 77 support zone) to cap further downside. CMP 76.67 is still above 20-DMA 69.41. If 74.50 breaks, PSU bank structure is compromised and we exit."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 978.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.7%. Entry at 984 and current SL also at 984 is essentially breakeven. Moving SL marginally to 978 (just below S1 pivot at 978.40) gives structure breathing room while still protecting against material loss. Strong Q4 beat + Buy upgrades intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Small -1.2% drawdown on defensive gold position. SL at 119 (5% below entry) is appropriate for ETF volatility. No change needed; holding as portfolio hedge against equity risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1685.00,
      "new_target": 1880.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +4.4%, near 52-week high with Bullish Marubozu. Current SL 1704.81 is already above entry (good) but after strong run I want a tiny bit of room — actually tightening further to 1685 would be incorrect (loosening vs current 1704.81). Keeping existing SL 1704.81 but raising target isn't needed either. REVISING: keeping current SL — emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position +0.7% post stellar Q4 (revenue +22.6%, PAT +27%). SL at 1350 is ~4.5% below entry which is reasonable given FMCG low-vol profile. Let the post-earnings momentum play out."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1030.00,
      "new_target": 1150.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +2.2%. Current SL at entry (1049.05). Q4 results TOMORROW (Apr 25) — binary event. Given analyst estimates already elevated, I want to lock in breakeven-plus by tightening SL to 1030 — wait, that's BELOW entry so it's loosening. Keeping SL at entry 1049.05 is correct for a binary-event day. Emitting HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.2%. SL at 650 is ~4.5% below entry. Q4 results Apr 29. Bullish pharma momentum intact. Shooting Star on Apr 22 is a minor caution but Apr 23 made new high. Keeping SL in place for pre-earnings room."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position at breakeven. SL 2260 (~4.7% below entry). Q4 results April 30. Defensive FMCG hold through earnings. No adjustment needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Small -0.4% drawdown. SL at 388 (~4% below entry). Power sector thesis intact; Q4 results May 15. Structure above SMA 20/50/200. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Position -0.9%. Stock at 52-week high and ~18% ABOVE consensus target Rs 177 — valuation risk real. Q4 results April 29. SL at 202 (~5.6% below entry). Given power-cluster concentration (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER already), I'm not adding. If ADANIPOWER shows any weakness tomorrow I'll consider exit. For now, the 202 SL holds."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.50,
      "reasoning": "Tighten wide SL from 73 to 74.50 — cap the bleed on this -5.9% laggard while giving PSU bank recovery thesis one more chance."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 978.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL marginally below entry to near-breakeven, aligned with S1 pivot support."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position, small drawdown, SL appropriate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry at 1704.81 (+3.3%) locking in gains. Tightening further into a breakout would choke the position; let the Marubozu breakout run with current SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Post-earnings momentum; let it develop. SL at 1350 gives room for normal pullback."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at entry (1049.05) is already locked at breakeven ahead of tomorrow's Q4 binary event. No further tightening warranted — binary events need breathing room, not choke."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 650 appropriate pre-earnings (Apr 29). Bullish pharma momentum."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Breakeven position ahead of Apr 30 results. SL adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Minor drawdown within noise. Trend structure intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Valuation stretched but SL at 202 caps risk. Q4 Apr 29 is the decision point. Will reassess closer to event."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "ICICIBANK (Q4 beat, clean credit) is a fundamentally attractive standalone long but adding would deepen financials-cluster exposure (already have MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK = 3 financial names). No room. INFY short tempting on weak FY27 guide but CMP 1240 is already at 52-week low and below lower Bollinger — chasing a gap-down short is low R:R. UNIONBANK bearish engulfing on heavy volume post-results — AVOID longs, not shorting because of financials cluster. TORNTPOWER breakout is the cleanest chart but already own — not doubling up in same power cluster.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 79% deployed — at the deployment ceiling. Remaining deployable only ~INR 14k. Per hysteresis rule + binary-event calendar (AUBANK Apr 25, ADANIPOWER Apr 29, GRANULES Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30, NTPC May 15), the right disposition is NO new entries today and focus entirely on SL discipline. Sector concentration check: Power cluster (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER) = ~INR 161k ≈ 16% of capital — watch-level, don't add. Financials (MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK) ~INR 358k ≈ 36% — AT the sector cap, no additions possible. Priority next tick: reassess MAHABANK at new tightened SL; manage AUBANK through tomorrow's earnings event."
}
